dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.todoDescription: This page is currently a read-only demo used to establish the sidebar entry and information architecture. Any interactive state will be reset on refresh.
dashboard.todoDeploymentHint: Recommended rollout order: frontend first, backend second
dashboard.todoSummaryContract: Confirm the sidebar todo-tab requirements, including menu path, component mapping, and rollout order.
dashboard.todoTitleData: Align homepage and todo page sample data
dashboard.todoSummaryData: Review the existing workspace sample items and decide whether they should be shared from one constant source.
dashboard.todoTitleSmoke: Complete the todo page smoke check
dashboard.todoSummarySmoke: Cover menu-tree verification and frontend type checks so the sidebar entry never points to a missing page.
dashboard.todoSummaryScope: Keep this release as a read-only demo page without adding a Todo API or database model.
